name: ExtensionDeviceDefinition_ConformsTo_Version
title: R5: The specific form or variant of the standard, specification or formal guidance
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceDefinition.conformsTo.version` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceDefinition.conformsTo.version` 0..* `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceDefinition.conformsTo.version` 0..* `string`
*  R4B: `DeviceDefinition.specialization.version` 0..1 `string`
*  R4: `DeviceDefinition.specialization.version` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceDefinition.conformsTo.version` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `DeviceDefinition.conformsTo.version` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DeviceDefinition.specialization.version` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: The specific form or variant of the standard, specification or formal guidance

element.short: The specific form or variant of the standard, specification or formal guidance
element.definition: Identifies the specific form or variant of the standard, specification, or formal guidance. This may be a 'version number', release, document edition, publication year, or other label.
